title: Various the roads of life; in one
content:
Various the roads of life; in one
    All terminate, one lonely way
    We go; and 'Is he gone?'
    Is all our best friends say.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Savage Landor, titled "Various the roads of life; in one", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
